var DocumentCronService_1;
Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true });
exports.DocumentCronService = void 0;
const common_1 = require("@nestjs/common");
const schedule_1 = require("@nestjs/schedule");
const prisma_service_1 = require("../../prisma/prisma.service");
const services_1 = require("../../common/services");
const document_expiry_service_1 = require("./services/document-expiry.service");
let DocumentCronService = DocumentCronService_1 = class DocumentCronService {
    constructor(prisma, storageService, documentExpiryService) {
        this.prisma = prisma;
        this.storageService = storageService;
        this.documentExpiryService = documentExpiryService;
        this.logger = new common_1.Logger(DocumentCronService_1.name);
        this.PREVIEW_CACHE_PREFIX = 'previews/';
        this.PREVIEW_CACHE_MAX_DAYS = 7;
    }
    async resetAnnualNumberSequences() {
        try {
            const result = await this.prisma.documentNumberCounter.updateMany({
                data: { sequence: 0 },
            });
            this.logger.log(`BR-312 年度默认编号计数器重置完成：共重置 ${result.count} 条记录序号`);
        }
        catch (error) {
            this.logger.error('BR-312 年度默认编号计数器重置失败', error);
        }
    }
    async manualResetSequences() {
        const result = await this.prisma.documentNumberCounter.updateMany({
            data: { sequence: 0 },
        });
        this.logger.log(`手动重置默认编号计数器序号：共重置 ${result.count} 条`);
        return { count: result.count };
    }
    async cleanupPreviewCache() {
        try {
            const objects = await this.storageService.listObjects(this.PREVIEW_CACHE_PREFIX);
            const cutoff = new Date();
            cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - this.PREVIEW_CACHE_MAX_DAYS);
            const staleObjects = objects.filter((obj) => obj.lastModified < cutoff);
            let deletedCount = 0;
            for (const obj of staleObjects) {
                try {
                    await this.storageService.deleteFile(obj.name);
                    deletedCount++;
                }
                catch (err) {
                    this.logger.warn(`删除预览缓存文件失败 ${obj.name}: ${err.message}`);
                }
            }
            this.logger.log(`文件预览缓存清理完成: 删除 ${deletedCount}/${staleObjects.length} 个超期文件`);
        }
        catch (error) {
            this.logger.error(`文件预览缓存清理失败: ${error.message}`, error.stack);
        }
    }
    async scanDocumentExpiry() {
        try {
            const result = await this.documentExpiryService.scanAndCreateTodos();
            this.logger.log(`业务文件到期扫描完成: ${JSON.stringify(result)}`);
        }
        catch (error) {
            this.logger.error(`业务文件到期扫描失败: ${error.message}`, error.stack);
        }
    }
};
exports.DocumentCronService = DocumentCronService;
__decorate([
    (0, schedule_1.Cron)('0 0 1 1 *'),
    __metadata("design:type", Function),
    __metadata("design:paramtypes", []),
    __metadata("design:returntype", Promise)
], DocumentCronService.prototype, "resetAnnualNumberSequences", null);
__decorate([
    (0, schedule_1.Cron)('0 3 * * *'),
    __metadata("design:type", Function),
    __metadata("design:paramtypes", []),
    __metadata("design:returntype", Promise)
], DocumentCronService.prototype, "cleanupPreviewCache", null);
__decorate([
    (0, schedule_1.Cron)('0 2 * * *'),
    __metadata("design:type", Function),
    __metadata("design:paramtypes", []),
    __metadata("design:returntype", Promise)
], DocumentCronService.prototype, "scanDocumentExpiry", null);
exports.DocumentCronService = DocumentCronService = DocumentCronService_1 = __decorate([
    (0, common_1.Injectable)(),
    __metadata("design:paramtypes", [prisma_service_1.PrismaService,
        services_1.StorageService,
        document_expiry_service_1.DocumentExpiryService])
], DocumentCronService);
//# sourceMappingURL=document-cron.service.js.map
